violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2026

The cutting boards in the kitchen is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the three bay. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2025
Establishment has a Serv-safe employee that is not registered with RIDOH. Application given to person in charge Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2023

Food contact surfaces of the toasters were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the cabinets and oven have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024
Establishment has a Serv-safe employee that is not registered with RIDOH. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/29/2023
Establishment has a Serv-safe employee does not register with RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2023

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. establishment will use the 3-compartment sink and quat disinfectant until the dishwasher is in good condition. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2023
Food contact surfaces of toasters were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2023
Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2023

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Unit was put out of service during time of the inspection. 3 Bay sink should be used for washed rinsed and sanitized. Invoice or proof for fixes should be sent to food inspector as a corrected action. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2023

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Bottle was change at the time of the inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine and quaternary ammonia sanitizing solution for the dishwasher and 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the cereal cabinet have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2023
